title: Dekton 52-Piece Drive Socket Set | Includes Ratchet Handle, Extension Bar, Adaptor, Spin Disc and Metric Sockets | Features Spark Plug & Spline Sockets with | Ideal for Versatile Applications
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Comprehensive Set: Includes 1/4" and 3/8" drive sockets, a 140mm spinner handle, a 170mm ratchet handle, a 3" extension bar, and an adaptor (1/4" drive to 3/8" drive) for versatile applications.

Varied Socket Sizes: Features a wide range of metric and imperial sockets. 1/4" drive includes metric sizes 4-13mm and imperial sizes 5/32"-1/2". 3/8" drive includes metric sizes 14-17mm and imperial sizes 9/16", 5/8", and 11/16".
Spark Plug & Spline Sockets: Equipped with a 3/8" drive spark plug socket (21mm/13/16") and imperial star sockets (1/4", 5/16", 3/8") for specialized tasks.
Durable Construction: Sockets have extra strong rounded walls that evenly grip bolts, reducing damage and ensuring a secure fit for long-lasting performance.
Practical Design: The set comes with a convenient handle and extension bar for ease of use and maneuverability, making it ideal for various DIY and professional tasks.
description: The Dekton 52-Piece Socket Set offers a comprehensive selection of tools for both professional and DIY projects. This set includes a variety of 1/4" and 3/8" drive sockets, along with essential accessories such as a 140mm spinner handle, 170mm ratchet handle, 3" extension bar, and a handy adaptor (1/4" drive to 3/8" drive). It features an extensive range of metric and imperial sockets, ensuring versatility for numerous applications. Metric sizes range from 4-17mm and imperial sizes from 5/32" to 1/2". The set also includes specialized spark plug sockets (21mm/13/16") and imperial star sockets (1/4", 5/16", 3/8"). Constructed with extra strong rounded walls, the sockets provide a secure grip on bolts, minimizing damage and enhancing durability. The set's practical design, including a comfortable handle and extension bar, ensures ease of use and efficient performance for various tasks.
